title: The ruin
why.not-closed: Something is open and never closed. Go top to bottom, tag by tag.
why.lost-title: The tab title is gone. The task is to CLOSE the tags, not delete them.
why.lost-h1: The heading is gone. The task is to CLOSE the tags, not delete them.
why.lost-p: One of the paragraphs is gone. There were two. The task is to close them, not remove them.
why.lost-img: The image is gone. The task is to CLOSE the tags, not delete them.
hint2.not-closed: Four tags are open and never closed. Find them.
hint3.not-closed: Start from the head. Look at <title>. Does it ever reach </title>? Then go down into the body.
hint4.not-closed:
Missing: , and both

. Now put them where they belong.
blocks.0.text: Here is code someone wrote in a hurry. It works. Almost.
blocks.1.text: Four tags are open and never closed. I will not tell you which.
blocks.3.text: Fix it. Run it and look at what comes out — that is your first clue. The browser does not stop with an error, it tries to clean up the mess for you. And it cleans up wrong.
blocks.4.text: Do not delete anything. Everything that is there must stay. Only close what is open.
blocks.5.text: The tests are hidden. They will not tell you WHAT is wrong — only that something is.
blocks.6.text: "Half the mistakes in real code are not syntax errors. The code works. It just lies."
